description_long: This is a large, irregularly shaped stone with a roughly triangular profile and a rugged, natural surface. The stone's exterior is predominantly gray with subtle variations in tone, and it features a weathered, matte finish with visible dirt and debris. One side of the stone has a pronounced, jagged edge, while the opposite side is broader and flatter, suggesting it may have been partially embedded in the ground. The surface is uneven, with small pits and crevices, and there is a noticeable patch of lighter coloration near one end. The stone appears solid and heavy, with no visible artificial modifications or carvings. Its overall appearance suggests it has been exposed to the elements for an extended period, contributing to its rough texture and muted coloration.
description: A large, rugged gray stone with an irregular triangular shape, rough surface, and weathered appearance. The stone is solid, heavy, and shows natural signs of aging and exposure.
description_view_0: The stone is seen from a side angle, highlighting its broad, flat base and a lighter patch near the top edge.
description_view_1: This view shows the stone's jagged, pointed end and a deep crevice running along its surface.
description_view_2: The stone appears narrower, with the crevice more prominent and the overall profile more angular.
description_view_3: The broader, flatter side of the stone is visible, with the lighter patch and rough surface texture clearly seen.
attribute_placement: set as a standalone feature or obstacle on the ground
attribute_pattern: Irregular mottling and subtle color variations, with no artificial carvings or regular patterns.
attribute_weathering: Rough and weathered, with visible dirt, small pits, and a matte finish indicating prolonged exposure to the elements.
attribute_integration_with_surroundings: Contrasts with paved or built surfaces, may be partially embedded in soil or surrounded by debris, blending naturally with outdoor urban environments.
